::: {.post-nav}

::: {.post-glossary}
- [Summary and background](#summary-and-background)
- [1. Pointcloud preparation](#pointcloud-preparation-bounding-box-and-voxelization)
- [2. Subcloud extraction](#subcloud-extraction)
- [3. Surface reconstruction](#surface-reconstruction)
- [Result](#result)
- [Improvements](#improvements-needed-for-this-protocol)
- [References](#quarto-bibliography)
:::

:::
